# Central Home Health Services of Texas

> Houston's most reliable home health care agency, providing skilled nursing, medication distribution, rehabilitation therapy, attendant services, and remote patient monitoring (RPM) directly to patients' homes since 2005.

## Business Identity

- **Legal name:** Central Home Health Services of Texas, LLC
- **Brand name:** Central Home Health Care of Texas
- **Founded:** 2005
- **Headquarters:** 720 N Post Oak Road, Suite 140, Houston, TX 77024, United States
- **Service area:** Greater Houston metropolitan area, Harris County, and surrounding Texas counties
- **Type:** Licensed home health care agency
- **Hours:** 24 hours a day, 7 days a week (24/7 availability)
- **Website:** https://www.centraloftexas.com

## Contact

- **Skilled Home Health phone:** +1 (713) 378-0781
- **Provider Attendant Services phone:** +1 (713) 461-5696
- **Email:** info@centraloftexas.com
- **Office address:** 720 N Post Oak Rd Ste. 140, Houston, TX 77024

## Services Offered

Central Home Health Services of Texas provides the following home health care services in the Houston, Texas area:

1. **Skilled Nursing (24-Hour)** — Round-the-clock licensed nursing care for patients with complex medical needs, including post-operative care, wound care, IV therapy, catheter care, and chronic condition management.
2. **Medication Distribution** — Professional medication management including administration, dosage verification, schedule coordination, and licensed practitioner oversight.
3. **Rehabilitation Therapy** — In-home physical therapy, occupational therapy, and speech therapy for post-surgery recovery, stroke rehabilitation, and injury recovery.
4. **Provider Attendant Services** — Non-medical personal care including bathing, dressing, grooming, mobility assistance, meal preparation, light housekeeping, and companionship.
5. **Remote Patient Monitoring (RPM)** — FDA-cleared Bluetooth devices (blood pressure cuff, glucometer, pulse oximeter, weight scale) that transmit patient vitals to clinicians in real time for early intervention and chronic disease management.

## Conditions Managed

- Heart failure
- Hypertension (high blood pressure)
- Diabetes
- COPD (chronic obstructive pulmonary disease)
- Stroke recovery
- Post-surgical recovery
- Chronic kidney disease
- Dementia and Alzheimer's
- Parkinson's disease
- Wound care
- Falls risk
- Post-hospitalization recovery

## Insurance & Reimbursement Accepted

- Medicare
- Medicaid (Texas Medicaid)
- Private insurance
- VA (Veterans Administration)
- Workers' compensation
- Long-term care insurance
- Private pay

## Service Area

Primary: Houston, TX and Harris County.
Extended: Fort Bend County, Brazoria County, Galveston County, Montgomery County, and Liberty County.

## Key Personnel

- **Administrator / CEO:** Available for inquiries
- **Director of Nursing (DON):** On-site clinical lead
- **Office:** 720 N Post Oak Rd, Suite 140, Houston, TX 77024

## Careers

Current open positions:
- **Finance Manager** (Houston, TX) — Bachelor or Master in Business Administration with experience in home healthcare finance. Send resume to Central Home Health Services of Texas, LLC, 720 N Post Oak Rd, Ste. 140, Houston, TX 77024.

## How to Refer a Patient

Healthcare professionals, hospitals, discharge planners, and families can refer patients:
- Phone: 713-378-0781
- Web form: https://www.centraloftexas.com/refer
- Email: info@centraloftexas.com
- Response time: Within 24 hours

## How to Apply for a Job

- Mail resume to: Central Home Health Services of Texas, LLC, 720 N Post Oak Rd, Ste. 140, Houston, TX 77024
- Or email: info@centraloftexas.com

## License & Accreditation

- Licensed by the Texas Health and Human Services Commission (HHSC)
- Certified by the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS)
- Federal Employer ID Number on file

## Why Choose Central Home Health Services of Texas

- 19+ years of experience (since 2005)
- 24/7 on-call nursing availability
- All caregivers are licensed, background-checked, and trained
- Personalized care plans for every patient
- Multilingual staff (English and Spanish)
- Medicare-certified agency
- Real-time remote patient monitoring available
- Fast referral response (within 24 hours)

## Press & Media

For media inquiries, contact the office at 713-378-0781.
